case_number: Criminal Revision Application No. S-59 of 2025

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Criminal Revision Application No. S-59 of 2025 (new) Criminal Revision Application No. S-159 of 2024 (old) DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 02.01.2026 Mr. Irfan Umrani advocate holds brief on behalf of Pir Jhandal Shah advocate for the applicant. Mr. Neel Parkash, D.P.G. = Mr. Irfan Umrani advocate holds brief on behalf of Pir Jhandal Shah advocate for the applicant (who is present in the Court but without Court uniform) and he, under instructions, states that the applicant has served out the sentence, hence he does not wish to press instant Revision Application; which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE “Saleem”
